# Vendored library versions

Audit trail for the CDN libraries vendored under `static/vendor/`. When bumping a
library, update its entry here with the new version and re-run the download.

| Library | Version | Source |
|---|---|---|
| marked | 14.1.4 | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/marked@14.1.4/marked.min.js |
| DOMPurify | 3.2.4 | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/dompurify@3.2.4/dist/purify.min.js |
| highlight.js | 11.10.0 | https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/highlight.js/11.10.0/highlight.min.js |
| highlight.js (github theme) | 11.10.0 | https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/highlight.js/11.10.0/styles/github.min.css |
| highlight.js (github-dark theme) | 11.10.0 | https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/highlight.js/11.10.0/styles/github-dark.min.css |
| mermaid | 10.9.1 | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mermaid@10.9.1/dist/mermaid.min.js |
| KaTeX | 0.16.11 | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.16.11/dist/katex.min.js , https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.16.11/dist/katex.min.css , https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.16.11/dist/fonts/ |
| EasyMDE | 2.20.0 | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/easymde@2.20.0/dist/easymde.min.js , https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/easymde@2.20.0/dist/easymde.min.css |
| FontAwesome Free | 6.7.2 | https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@fortawesome/fontawesome-free@6.7.2/css/all.min.css , https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@fortawesome/fontawesome-free@6.7.2/webfonts/ |
